problem id: 69cbffdf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  11000100 -> 00000010
  00111101 -> 00000000
  00011000 -> 00000000
  00100101 -> 00000000
  10010110 -> 00000000
  00110101 -> 00000000
  01010100 -> 00000000
  00100000 -> 00000000
  10000001 -> 00000100

query: 11011000
predicted answer: 00000010
